perspectives.description: The pool manager is responsible for maintaining the facility and ensuring it has enough funds to operate. They must decide whether to enforce the rules about entry fees or consider the broader implications of their decision on the community.

One of the kids sneaking into the pool is looking for a way to cool off on a hot day and is unaware of the financial implications of their actions. Their enjoyment and day are at stake if they are caught and reported.
A local family relies on the pool for affordable recreation during the summer. If the pool loses funding due to unpaid entry fees, they may face higher costs or limited access in the future.
